name: linSilentWakeup
title: linSilentWakeup
tables: Wakes up the LIN bus without sending any wake-up frames. Note When called during Wakeup mode this function has no effect. This function can be useful before issuing Go-to-Sleep command in order to ensure Wakeup mode.
Note When called during Wakeup mode this function has no effect. This function can be useful before issuing Go-to-Sleep command in order to ensure Wakeup mode.
Note When called during Wakeup mode this function has no effect. This function can be useful before issuing Go-to-Sleep command in order to ensure Wakeup mode.
On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
